text: Thank you for calling Mega Proud Pen Support.
How can I help you today?
My internet suddenly red light blinking.
I got 10 minutes only to submit my university final project.
We can sort this out one.
Let me check your line state from my side.
Can you give me your account number or IC number?
My laptop portal is just spinning and spinning only.
My parents will kill me weh.
I already pulled up your account.
I see there is a sudden fibre cable cut in your area.
So the main line is down.
The portal problem we can bypass.
Do you have your phone with mobile data nearby?
But my project file is 500 megabyte way.
5G hotspot is more than fast enough for 500 meg.
Don't think about the router now.
Turn on your personal hotspot immediately and connect your laptop to it.
Aduh, my hands are shaking so hard.
I cannot type my password properly.
See, you still have 7 minutes left.
I will write an official system downtime report
and email it to you right away.
you can use that email as proof for your lecturer.
Oh my god, thank you so much.
Looks like it's going up quite fast eh.
You are a lifesaver lah, seriously.
I was about to cry just now.
We all know the stress of submission deadlines.
Just make sure the submission goes through completely.
I can help you log your report for your house router repair.
you just proceed with the report lah.
I've logged the repair ticket for your house router.
The technician will come over tomorrow morning.
Anything else I can help you with?
